sensitivity.public: Fine even outside the company. Expect this to be rare.
sensitivity.internal: Any staff member — org-general and up.
sensitivity.department: One pillar only (Commerce/Erify/Erisa), any tier within it.
sensitivity.restricted: Named leadership groups only. Widening the audience list on a restricted document requires the document owner's explicit sign-off, not just an author's edit.

status.draft: Not yet reviewed. Never synced to a live knowledge collection.
status.superseded: Replaced by another document — must set meta.replaced_by to that document's id.
status.archived: No longer relevant. Kept for provenance, excluded from sync.

audiences.note: org-general (the GM, read-only) and admins (read-write) are never listed in a document's audiences — they're granted automatically at sync time on every collection, regardless of sensitivity, matching the same reasoning already applied to the eridu_mcp and Eridu CMD grant fixes.
